name: CyberChef
shortDescription: Data manipulation in the browser (GCHQ CyberChef).
description: Encode, decode, compress, parse, and transform data using the CyberChef recipe model.

notes: Bundled upstream v10.22.1 static build (wrapper MVP)

name: Translation
shortDescription: Translate text between languages via MyMemory.
description: Paste plain text, choose source and target languages, and translate using the public MyMemory API (browser-based; subject to provider limits).

name: Transcription
shortDescription: Speech-to-text in the browser.
description: Record from your microphone with the Web Speech API, or upload audio/video for client-side Whisper transcription. Live mic uses the browser/OS engine; file upload runs a local Whisper model in the browser.

name: Transliteration
shortDescription: Convert between scripts (Cyrillic, Greek, kana).
description: Transliterate text locally: Russian Cyrillic to Latin, Greek to Latin, or Japanese hiragana/katakana to romaji.

name: Glossary
shortDescription: Browse the SuperApp glossary of terms and definitions.
description: Opens the parent SuperApp glossary in the main window (top frame). Use it to look up terminology and shared definitions across the platform.

notes: Catalog entry linking to parent glossary

name: List Compare
shortDescription: Compare lines or crosswalk two delimited tables by key.
description: Lines mode: paste two lists (one item per line) for only A, only B, and both. Crosswalk mode: paste TSV/CSV tables, choose key columns, optional fuzzy key matching, and get matched pairs plus unmatched rows.

notes: Crosswalk mode: key columns, delimiter options, fuzzy key similarity, shared data helpers
Initial list compare with copyable sections

name: Table Workspace
shortDescription: Paste tables, profile columns, dedupe, pivot, normalize, and extract dates.
description: Load TSV/CSV-style data once, then switch between a sortable filterable grid, column profiler, dedupe by key or whole row, simple pivot (sum or count), text normalization and column split, timeline extraction from free text, and find-replace across cells. Exports CSV or TSV. All processing stays in the browser.

notes: Initial table workspace: grid, profiler, dedupe, pivot, normalize, timeline, find-replace

name: MRZ Decoder
shortDescription: Decode passport and ID machine-readable zones (ICAO).
description: Parse TD1, TD2, and TD3 MRZ lines locally: names, document number, nationality, dates, sex, and check digits. Optional autocorrect for single-character OCR errors. Shows approximate age and days until or since expiry from parsed dates.

notes: Approximate age and expiry countdown from parsed birth and expiration dates
Initial MRZ decoder with ICAO field breakdown

name: IBAN & BIC Validator
shortDescription: Validate IBAN and optional BIC/SWIFT locally.
description: Check IBAN checksum and structure, show electronic and grouped formats, and optionally validate a BIC/SWIFT using ibantools in the browser.

name: Phone Number
shortDescription: Parse and validate international phone numbers.
description: Parse phone numbers with libphonenumber-js: E.164, country, national format, and line type. Choose a default region when the number has no country code.

name: Tax & National ID
shortDescription: EU VAT, US EIN, and UK NI format checks.
description: Validate EU VAT numbers (checksum for DE and NL; format checks for FR, GB, ES), US EIN prefix ranges, and UK National Insurance format. Does not prove a number is issued or active.

name: Payment Cards (Luhn)
shortDescription: Luhn check and length heuristics for card numbers.
description: Run the Luhn algorithm and common length/brand heuristics on digits you paste. Not a substitute for PCI-compliant handling; avoid real PANs unless policy allows.

notes: Initial Luhn and brand heuristic tool

name: Crypto Wallet Address Validator
shortDescription: Bitcoin Base58Check and Ethereum EIP-55 checksum validation.
description: Verify Bitcoin P2PKH/P2SH addresses with Base58Check (double SHA-256 checksum) and Ethereum hex addresses with EIP-55 mixed-case checksum (Keccak-256). All checks run locally in your browser; Bech32 (bc1) is not covered.

name: Barcode & QR
shortDescription: Decode barcodes and QR codes from an image file.
description: Upload an image; ZXing decodes QR, PDF417, Data Matrix, Code 128, EAN, and other common formats locally in your browser.

name: Image metadata stripper
shortDescription: Remove EXIF and embedded metadata before upload or share.
description: Re-encode images in your browser so EXIF, GPS, and other metadata are not included in the saved file. Use for field photos and comms assets. JPEG and PNG stay as JPEG/PNG when supported; other raster types export as PNG. Animated GIFs become a single frame.

name: Pomodoro Timer
shortDescription: Focus and break timer with configurable intervals.
description: Run focus sessions, short breaks, and long breaks with drift-corrected countdowns. Adjust durations, pause, skip, and reset. Time runs in your browser only.

name: Unit Converter
shortDescription: Convert length, mass, speed, temperature, and more.
description: Convert between units for length, mass, volume, area, speed, temperature, pressure, digital storage, time, and other measures. All calculations run locally in your browser.

name: World Clock
shortDescription: Track multiple time zones with live updating clocks.
description: Add cities from a curated list of IANA time zones, see local date and time with second precision, and keep your selection saved in this browser. No network calls.

name: Speed Reader
shortDescription: RSVP reading with ORP pivot, fonts, and text, PDF, or Word import.
description: Paste text or load a plain-text file, PDF, or Word document (.docx) with client-side extraction. Adjust words per minute, font size and family, and read with Spritz-style optimal recognition point highlighting. Settings and text can be saved in this browser.

notes: Import Microsoft Word .docx files (Mammoth, client-side text extraction)
Initial speed reader: RSVP, ORP pivot, WPM, fonts, .txt and PDF import

name: Magic To-Do
shortDescription: Break a goal into clear subtasks with the hosted assistant.
description: Describe a task or goal; the assistant returns an ordered list of actionable steps. Uses your platform LLM; prompts are original and not copied from third-party sites.

name: Formalizer
shortDescription: Rewrite text for a chosen tone using the hosted assistant.
description: Paste text and pick a tone (e.g. professional, friendly, concise). The assistant rephrases while preserving meaning. Uses your platform LLM.

name: Judge
shortDescription: Read a short text for tone and intent with the hosted assistant.
description: Paste a message or note; the assistant summarizes likely emotional tone and intent. Not a substitute for professional judgment. Uses your platform LLM.

name: Professor
shortDescription: Explain a topic or question with the hosted assistant.
description: Ask for a clear explanation of a concept or question. The assistant responds with structured, readable prose. Uses your platform LLM.

name: Consultant
shortDescription: Compare options and get a practical take with the hosted assistant.
description: Describe your situation and options; the assistant outlines tradeoffs and a suggested direction. Uses your platform LLM.

name: Estimator
shortDescription: Rough time estimate for an activity with the hosted assistant.
description: Describe what needs doing; the assistant gives a range and what would change the estimate. Uses your platform LLM.

name: Compiler
shortDescription: Turn notes into actionable items with the hosted assistant.
description: Paste unstructured notes or a braindump; the assistant returns a concise list of next actions. Uses your platform LLM.

name: Regex Pattern Tester
shortDescription: Build and test regular expressions against sample text.
description: Enter a JavaScript-style pattern and flags, paste sample text, and inspect matches and capture groups. Optional replacement preview.

name: Base64 Encode/Decode
shortDescription: Encode UTF-8 text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text.
description: Convert between plain text and Base64 using UTF-8. Optional URL-safe alphabet (RFC 4648). Whitespace is ignored when decoding.

name: IMEI Decoder
shortDescription: IMEI structure, Luhn check, and TAC display.
description: Validate a 15-digit IMEI with Luhn, split TAC and serial fields, and show illustrative TAC hints (not a full GSMA database).

name: VIN Decoder
shortDescription: Vehicle identification number breakdown and check digit.
description: Parse WMI, VDS, and VIS fields, decode model-year code (30-year cycle), verify ISO check digit, and show curated WMI hints.

name: Unix / Epoch Timestamp Converter
shortDescription: Convert between epoch and ISO time with time zones.
description: Edit Unix time in seconds or milliseconds, sync with ISO 8601 (UTC), and view formatted wall time in a chosen IANA time zone.

name: Date/Time Normalizer
shortDescription: Normalize mixed date formats to ISO lines.
description: Paste one value per line: ISO, numeric epoch, or ambiguous numeric dates with EU or US month/day order. Outputs ISO 8601 (UTC) per line.

name: Timeline Builder
shortDescription: Sort events and view a simple chronology.
description: Enter events as a timestamp (ISO or Unix) plus a label separated by tab, pipe, or space. Events sort chronologically with a vertical timeline layout.

name: Duration Calculator
shortDescription: Elapsed time, business days with holiday calendars, and calendar offsets.
description: Compute elapsed span between two ISO instants (with weekday counts), count business days between two dates with US Federal or UK bank holiday exclusions and custom date overrides, and add years/months/days for statute-style date math (informational only).

notes: Added business day counter with configurable holiday calendars (US Federal, UK England & Wales)
Custom holiday dates field for ad-hoc exclusions and exceptional bank holidays
Breakdown shows calendar days, weekends excluded, and holidays excluded separately

name: Coordinate Converter
shortDescription: Decimal degrees, DMS, UTM, and MGRS (WGS84).
description: Parse decimal degrees, MGRS, or UTM and show equivalent formats on the WGS84 ellipsoid using in-browser conversion libraries.

name: GeoRepo
shortDescription: Polygon layers and vector data for geospatial queries and map integration.
description: External hosted platform for polygon features, administrative boundaries, and reference datasets. Use it to store and query geospatial data, publish OGC WFS/WMS layers, and integrate with GIS clients. Opens georepo.com in a new tab.
